prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
# You've Got This!

Listen, that task isn't getting any smaller by waiting. The morning's already slipped away, but right now—this moment—is your fresh start.

Your future self is going to be so thankful you finally jumped in. The relief you'll feel when it's done will be worth every minute of effort.

Remember: starting is always the hardest part. Break it down, focus on just the first step, and build momentum. You're capable, you're prepared, and honestly, you're stronger than this challenge.

Deep breath. Now go show that task who's boss.
